markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce and onboard the Ops team to Linear, a project management tool being adopted company-wide.](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Linear will replace scattered Slack threads/emails for task tracking, improving visibility and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [The team will create an Ops-specific private team in Linear with public/private projects as needed](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Everyone should experiment with moving at least one project/task into Linear this week](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [When assigning tasks, create a Linear ticket immediately after Slack communication](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Topics

### Linear Overview and Benefits

  - [Syncs with Slack for streamlined communication](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Provides a centralized location for task tracking and project management](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Offers customizable views, boards, and filtering options](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Allows for easy prioritization and assignment of tasks](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

### Ops Team Linear Setup

  - [Created a private Ops team in Linear](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Discussed potential for public and private projects within the team](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)
  - [Considered sub-teams for specific areas (e.g., IT and Cybersecurity)](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Agreed to start with a shared miscellaneous board for small tasks](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)

### Use Cases and Examples

  - [Employee onboarding: Create a project template with recurring tasks](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Background check process: Break down into steps, assign team members](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Month-end financial reviews: Set up recurring tasks with assignments](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [MDM tool selection and implementation: Create a project with milestones](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)

### Adoption Strategy

  - [Each team member to move one project/task into Linear this week](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Create Linear tickets immediately after Slack communications for task assignments](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Over-index on using Linear for a few weeks to learn what works best](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Calibrate priorities together, with Bridget providing oversight](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=2331.0)

### Privacy Considerations

  - [Discussed need for private projects/teams for sensitive information (e.g., hiring, finance)](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Agreed to link to external documents for confidential content rather than storing in Linear](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create an Ops-specific Linear activity Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=2411.0)
  - [Move the new hire onboarding process from Notion to Linear as a test case](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)
  - [Each team member to identify and add one potential project to Linear](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Experiment with creating Linear tickets directly from Slack conversations](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Regularly review and adjust Linear usage based on team feedback and effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/9psVvWzkiZcUWBcD8yZFmYWxN6JaT2Q_?tab=summary&timestamp=2694.0)
